abstract: Comprehensive authoring guide for the Swirls DSL. Covers file structure (nine top-level declarations including stream blocks), graph declarations, all 13 node types (ai, bucket, code, document, firecrawl, graph, http, parallel, postgres, resend, stream, switch, wait), embedded TypeScript/JSON/SQL blocks, the context object, resources, triggers, top-level stream blocks with condition/prepare, reviews, failure policies, and known parser pitfalls with an exhaustive validator-diagnostic cheatsheet.
